{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Motion & Graphics Designer",
  "description": "Leanx Support and Consulting is passionate about helping businesses thrive. Our comprehensive suite of services is designed to unlock your business&#39;s full potential and drive success. From HR Business Process Outsourcing to strategic digital marketing, lead generation, and expert business consultation, we provide the tools and expertise you need to accelerate growth and outshine the competition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Motion &amp; Graphics Designer&nbsp;
Job Location:&nbsp;&nbsp;Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Leanx Support is looking for a creative and detail-oriented Motion &amp; Graphics Designer to join our team.


Key Responsibilities


	Design high-quality graphics for social media, websites, and marketing campaigns
	Create engaging motion graphics and short video animations
	Collaborate with the content and marketing teams to develop creative concepts
	Ensure consistency in brand visuals across all platforms
	Edit and optimize video content for different channels
	Stay up to date with design trends and tools


Requirements


	1&ndash;2 years of experience in graphics design and/or motion design
	Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, and Premiere Pro
	Strong portfolio showcasing both static and motion design work
	Basic understanding of branding and visual communication
	Ability to meet deadlines and work independently
	Strong attention to detail and creativity.


Note:&nbsp;Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-21",

Motion & Graphics Designer  Job at Leanx Support and Consulting




        
    

        
        Leanx Support and Consulting is passionate about helping businesses thrive. Our comprehensive suite of services is designed to unlock your business's full potential and drive success. From HR Business Process Outsourcing to strategic digital marketing, lead generation, and expert business consultation, we provide the tools and expertise you need to accelerate growth and outshine the competition.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Motion & Graphics Designer 
Job Location:  Remote
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Leanx Support is looking for a creative and detail-oriented Motion & Graphics Designer to join our team.


Key Responsibilities


	Design high-quality graphics for social media, websites, and marketing campaigns
	Create engaging motion graphics and short video animations
	Collaborate with the content and marketing teams to develop creative concepts
	Ensure consistency in brand visuals across all platforms
	Edit and optimize video content for different channels
	Stay up to date with design trends and tools


Requirements


	1–2 years of experience in graphics design and/or motion design
	Proficiency in tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, After Effects, and Premiere Pro
	Strong portfolio showcasing both static and motion design work
	Basic understanding of branding and visual communication
	Ability to meet deadlines and work independently
	Strong attention to detail and creativity.


Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Medical Laboratory Technician",
  "description": "Green diagnostics is a fully operational Standard Tertiary research Laboratory with state of arts equipments. We conduct Tests ranging from Prenatal Fetal Genotype/CVS, Hormonal assay, Tumor markers for cancer detection, D-dimer, HIV(ELISA method), Renal function Test, Liver function, Heart function, Brain function, Hematology analysis, Parasitology, Microbiology and Immuno assays, Chorionic villus Sampling,Research for B.Sc, M.Sc &amp; PhD Students, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Laboratory Technician

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief


	We are looking for a qualified Lab Technician to undertake a variety of laboratory procedures of technical nature. You will be handling sensitive equipment to analyze samples or substances and conduct tests reporting findings to a laboratory manager.
	The ideal candidate will have experience in working under possibly hazardous conditions (e.g. pathogens or chemicals). He/She will be well-trained to maintain safety conditions and will be passionate for doing work that makes things move forward.
	The goal is to optimize lab procedures and succeed in producing reliable and important results that can be used to make a difference.


Responsibilities


	Receive, label and analyze samples (blood, toxic, tissue etc.).
	Design and execute laboratory testing according standard procedures, make observations and interpret findings.
	Conduct experiments under defined conditions to verify/reject various types of hypotheses using refined scientific methods.
	Organize and store all chemicals substances, fluids and compressed gases according to safety instructions.
	Record all data and results in specified forms (paper and electronic) with accuracy and responsibility.
	Maintain equipment and assist in ordering laboratory supplies.
	Ensure that all safety guidelines are followed strictly at all times and maintain a clean and orderly environment.


Requirements and Skills


	Proven experience as Lab Technician or relevant position.
	Experience in operating electrical and nonelectrical laboratory equipment and potentially dangerous substances .(flammable liquids, infectious bacteria, biohazards etc.).
	In depth knowledge of QHSE Systems, preventative measures and laboratory best practices.
	Excellent physical condition and endurance.
	Working knowledge of MS Office (especially Excel) and database systems.
	Ability to work autonomously and under pressure.
	Valid laboratory technician license.
	Degree in biology, chemistry or relevant field.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to:&nbsp;greendiagnosticscompanylimited@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

Medical Laboratory Technician Job at Green Diagnostics




        
    

        
        Green diagnostics is a fully operational Standard Tertiary research Laboratory with state of arts equipments. We conduct Tests ranging from Prenatal Fetal Genotype/CVS, Hormonal assay, Tumor markers for cancer detection, D-dimer, HIV(ELISA method), Renal function Test, Liver function, Heart function, Brain function, Hematology analysis, Parasitology, Microbiology and Immuno assays, Chorionic villus Sampling,Research for B.Sc, M.Sc & PhD Students, etc.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Medical Laboratory Technician

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Brief
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a qualified Lab Technician to undertake a variety of laboratory procedures of technical nature. You will be handling sensitive equipment to analyze samples or substances and conduct tests reporting findings to a laboratory manager.
	The ideal candidate will have experience in working under possibly hazardous conditions (e.g. pathogens or chemicals). He/She will be well-trained to maintain safety conditions and will be passionate for doing work that makes things move forward.
	The goal is to optimize lab procedures and succeed in producing reliable and important results that can be used to make a difference.


Responsibilities


	Receive, label and analyze samples (blood, toxic, tissue etc.).
	Design and execute laboratory testing according standard procedures, make observations and interpret findings.
	Conduct experiments under defined conditions to verify/reject various types of hypotheses using refined scientific methods.
	Organize and store all chemicals substances, fluids and compressed gases according to safety instructions.
	Record all data and results in specified forms (paper and electronic) with accuracy and responsibility.
	Maintain equipment and assist in ordering laboratory supplies.
	Ensure that all safety guidelines are followed strictly at all times and maintain a clean and orderly environment.


Requirements and Skills


	Proven experience as Lab Technician or relevant position.
	Experience in operating electrical and nonelectrical laboratory equipment and potentially dangerous substances .(flammable liquids, infectious bacteria, biohazards etc.).
	In depth knowledge of QHSE Systems, preventative measures and laboratory best practices.
	Excellent physical condition and endurance.
	Working knowledge of MS Office (especially Excel) and database systems.
	Ability to work autonomously and under pressure.
	Valid laboratory technician license.
	Degree in biology, chemistry or relevant field.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should forward their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Head, Credit & Lending",
  "description": "Strait Sahara Microfinance Bank is a fast-paced start-up Microfinance Bank, led by a group of talented, passionate, and skilled individuals who take the mission to re-invent banking using innovation and technology to provide high-quality service seriously. The goal is to empower generations by providing our customers with specific products and services to help them increase their net worth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Credit &amp; Lending

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description


	The Head, Credit &amp; Lending will be responsible for establishing and managing the Bank&rsquo;s end-to-end credit and lending function, including credit policy development, loan origination, underwriting, portfolio management, and recovery strategy, in line with regulatory requirements and business objectives.
	The role involves designing credit frameworks, processes, and governance structures to support sustainable loan growth, portfolio quality, and risk-adjusted returns.
	The successful candidate will provide strategic direction on lending activities while ensuring strong credit discipline, effective delinquency management, and alignment with the Bank&rsquo;s risk appetite within a startup digital microfinance banking environment.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement the Bank&rsquo;s credit and lending framework from inception.
	Design and maintain credit policies, underwriting standards, and approval processes.
	Oversee loan origination, appraisal, approval, and disbursement processes.
	Establish and manage digital lending models and credit scoring methodologies.
	Drive growth of the Bank&rsquo;s loan portfolio across target segments (retail, SME, micro-lending).
	Monitor portfolio performance, including PAR, NPL ratios, and loan quality indicators.
	Design and implement collections, delinquency management, and recovery strategies.
	Ensure proper credit documentation, collateral management, and compliance standards.
	Work closely with Risk Management to ensure alignment with risk appetite and credit limits.
	Collaborate with Technology and Product teams to build automated lending processes.
	Ensure compliance with CBN credit guidelines and microfinance banking regulations.
	Prepare and present credit reports to Executive Management and Board Credit Committee.
	Establish and manage relationships with credit bureaus and other data providers.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration, or related disciplines
	Professional certifications such as CFA, ACCA, ACA, or Credit Risk certifications are an added advantage.


Experience


	Minimum of 12 years of experience in Credit, Lending, or Risk Management within banking or financial services
	At least 7 years in a senior credit leadership role
	Strong experience in loan portfolio management, underwriting, and credit policy development
	Experience in microfinance banking or digital lending/fintech environment is highly desirable
	Demonstrated ability to develop credit frameworks, systems, and processes independently.


Other Requirements:


	High level of integrity and sound professional judgment
	Strong sense of ownership and accountability
	Ability to operate effectively in a startup environment with evolving structures
	Capacity to build and implement credit and lending systems from ground zero
	Strong leadership and team development capability.


Skills:


	Strong expertise in credit risk assessment and loan underwriting
	Knowledge of digital lending models and credit scoring systems
	Experience in loan portfolio management and performance monitoring
	Understanding of collections, recovery, and delinquency management
	Strong analytical and financial evaluation skills
	Knowledge of CBN regulations and microfinance lending practices
	Ability to design and implement credit processes and frameworks
	Strong decision-making and problem-solving skills
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management ability.


Remuneration


	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to lead a core revenue-generating function in a high-growth fintech bank.

Head, Credit & Lending Job at Strait Sahara Microfinance Bank




        
    

        
        Strait Sahara Microfinance Bank is a fast-paced start-up Microfinance Bank, led by a group of talented, passionate, and skilled individuals who take the mission to re-invent banking using innovation and technology to provide high-quality service seriously. The goal is to empower generations by providing our customers with specific products and services to help them increase their net worth.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Head, Credit & Lending

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Description
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Head, Credit & Lending will be responsible for establishing and managing the Bank’s end-to-end credit and lending function, including credit policy development, loan origination, underwriting, portfolio management, and recovery strategy, in line with regulatory requirements and business objectives.
	The role involves designing credit frameworks, processes, and governance structures to support sustainable loan growth, portfolio quality, and risk-adjusted returns.
	The successful candidate will provide strategic direction on lending activities while ensuring strong credit discipline, effective delinquency management, and alignment with the Bank’s risk appetite within a startup digital microfinance banking environment.


Responsibilities


	Develop and implement the Bank’s credit and lending framework from inception.
	Design and maintain credit policies, underwriting standards, and approval processes.
	Oversee loan origination, appraisal, approval, and disbursement processes.
	Establish and manage digital lending models and credit scoring methodologies.
	Drive growth of the Bank’s loan portfolio across target segments (retail, SME, micro-lending).
	Monitor portfolio performance, including PAR, NPL ratios, and loan quality indicators.
	Design and implement collections, delinquency management, and recovery strategies.
	Ensure proper credit documentation, collateral management, and compliance standards.
	Work closely with Risk Management to ensure alignment with risk appetite and credit limits.
	Collaborate with Technology and Product teams to build automated lending processes.
	Ensure compliance with CBN credit guidelines and microfinance banking regulations.
	Prepare and present credit reports to Executive Management and Board Credit Committee.
	Establish and manage relationships with credit bureaus and other data providers.


Requirements
Education:


	Bachelor’s Degree in Finance, Accounting, Economics, Business Administration, or related disciplines
	Professional certifications such as CFA, ACCA, ACA, or Credit Risk certifications are an added advantage.


Experience


	Minimum of 12 years of experience in Credit, Lending, or Risk Management within banking or financial services
	At least 7 years in a senior credit leadership role
	Strong experience in loan portfolio management, underwriting, and credit policy development
	Experience in microfinance banking or digital lending/fintech environment is highly desirable
	Demonstrated ability to develop credit frameworks, systems, and processes independently.


Other Requirements:


	High level of integrity and sound professional judgment
	Strong sense of ownership and accountability
	Ability to operate effectively in a startup environment with evolving structures
	Capacity to build and implement credit and lending systems from ground zero
	Strong leadership and team development capability.


Skills:


	Strong expertise in credit risk assessment and loan underwriting
	Knowledge of digital lending models and credit scoring systems
	Experience in loan portfolio management and performance monitoring
	Understanding of collections, recovery, and delinquency management
	Strong analytical and financial evaluation skills
	Knowledge of CBN regulations and microfinance lending practices
	Ability to design and implement credit processes and frameworks
	Strong decision-making and problem-solving skills
	Excellent communication and stakeholder management ability.


Remuneration


	Performance-based incentives
	Opportunity to lead a core revenue-generating function in a high-growth fintech bank.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Area Manager",
  "description": "Lumos Nigeria is a leading provider of high-quality solar home systems, offering a range of reliable and affordable energy solutions designed to power households and small businesses across Nigeria. The company focuses on delivering clean, renewable electricity through innovative solar technology, helping customers reduce dependence on unreliable grid power and fuel generators. With a strong emphasis on accessibility and convenience, Lumos Nigeria combines durable equipment with flexible payment options, making sustainable energy more attainable for everyday users while supporting economic productivity and improved quality of life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Area Manager

Job Locations:&nbsp;Akwa Ibom, Cross River, Delta, and Edo
Employment Type:&nbsp;Full-time

Job Purpose


	Drive the implementation of the company&rsquo;s sales strategy within the assigned state to achieve customer acquisition and repayment targets.
	Lead and manage the territory team to deliver strong performance in sales, inventory management, customer onboarding, and repayment collection.
	Oversee the end-to-end sales process, ensuring seamless customer acquisition, product installation, activation, and adoption of company applications/services.
	Build and develop a high-performing team through effective people management, coaching, training, and capability development initiatives.
	Ensure timely achievement of business objectives while fostering accountability and clear understanding of individual contributions to overall business performance.
	Support Lumos Nigeria&rsquo;s growth ambitions by expanding access to clean, reliable, and affordable solar energy solutions for customers in both on-grid and off-grid communities across Nigeria.


Key Accountabilities
Increase sale revenue:


	Coordinate state sales activities and ensure synergy with other activities within and outside the department and contribute to developing and executing the state business plan.
	Implementing sales goals and communicating them to Territory managers and Lumos Community Partners (LCP).
	Preparing sales reports and submitting them to VP Community business.
	Follow up the sales figures against the set sales target on daily and monthly basis; provide recommendations for necessary actions.
	Conduct sales promotion activities within the assigned budget.
	Review sales operations in state ensuring operational objectives are accomplished, identifying trends, providing input into sales forecasting and ensuring optimum service levels are achieved and maintained.
	Attend sales team meetings on a periodic basis to communicate product strategies, upcoming objectives and exchange ideas on how to support Partners achieve their targets and promote products.
	Ensure prompt payment from customers and take necessary actions to minimize bad debts.
	Formulate policies that will drive adoption of product.
	Drive premium subscription amongst customers joining
	Identify and formulate state sales strategies to help drive distribution across communities.
	Ensure expansions to align to dimensioned number of active community partnership.


Educational Qualifications &amp; Functional / Technical Skills


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Management or related Social Sciences
	8 - 10 years of varied experience in Sales &amp; Marketing with at least 4 years at middle management level in supervising/managing others.
	Relevant experience in Telecom or FMCG industry is desirable.
	Fluent in English
	Master&rsquo;s in business administration would be an additional qualification
	Experience working in multi-level marketing is an added advantage.
	Proven work experience in the power/energy industry
	Proven track record in sales/ distributor account management
	Customer management experience.


Key Functional Competencies:


	Business Performance Measurement &amp; Management
	Computer &amp; Information Technology Appreciation
	Marketing and Sales Acumen
	Planning and Budgeting
	Product &amp; Service Advice &amp; Support
	Sales Planning and Opportunity Management.
	Sales Tracking and Reporting
	Excellent communication and Managerial skills.
	The ability to work under stress and resolve conflict.
	Sales Forecasting
	Have solid knowledge of the sales terrain.


Note: Kindly click on the link provided and follow the application instructions.",

Area Manager Job at Lumos Nigeria




        
    

        
        Lumos Nigeria is a leading provider of high-quality solar home systems, offering a range of reliable and affordable energy solutions designed to power households and small businesses across Nigeria. The company focuses on delivering clean, renewable electricity through innovative solar technology, helping customers reduce dependence on unreliable grid power and fuel generators. With a strong emphasis on accessibility and convenience, Lumos Nigeria combines durable equipment with flexible payment options, making sustainable energy more attainable for everyday users while supporting economic productivity and improved quality of life.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Area Manager
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Locations: Akwa Ibom, Cross River, Delta, and Edo
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Purpose


	Drive the implementation of the company’s sales strategy within the assigned state to achieve customer acquisition and repayment targets.
	Lead and manage the territory team to deliver strong performance in sales, inventory management, customer onboarding, and repayment collection.
	Oversee the end-to-end sales process, ensuring seamless customer acquisition, product installation, activation, and adoption of company applications/services.
	Build and develop a high-performing team through effective people management, coaching, training, and capability development initiatives.
	Ensure timely achievement of business objectives while fostering accountability and clear understanding of individual contributions to overall business performance.
	Support Lumos Nigeria’s growth ambitions by expanding access to clean, reliable, and affordable solar energy solutions for customers in both on-grid and off-grid communities across Nigeria.


Key Accountabilities
Increase sale revenue:


	Coordinate state sales activities and ensure synergy with other activities within and outside the department and contribute to developing and executing the state business plan.
	Implementing sales goals and communicating them to Territory managers and Lumos Community Partners (LCP).
	Preparing sales reports and submitting them to VP Community business.
	Follow up the sales figures against the set sales target on daily and monthly basis; provide recommendations for necessary actions.
	Conduct sales promotion activities within the assigned budget.
	Review sales operations in state ensuring operational objectives are accomplished, identifying trends, providing input into sales forecasting and ensuring optimum service levels are achieved and maintained.
	Attend sales team meetings on a periodic basis to communicate product strategies, upcoming objectives and exchange ideas on how to support Partners achieve their targets and promote products.
	Ensure prompt payment from customers and take necessary actions to minimize bad debts.
	Formulate policies that will drive adoption of product.
	Drive premium subscription amongst customers joining
	Identify and formulate state sales strategies to help drive distribution across communities.
	Ensure expansions to align to dimensioned number of active community partnership.


Educational Qualifications & Functional / Technical Skills


	Bachelor’s Degree in Management or related Social Sciences
	8 - 10 years of varied experience in Sales & Marketing with at least 4 years at middle management level in supervising/managing others.
	Relevant experience in Telecom or FMCG industry is desirable.
	Fluent in English
	Master’s in business administration would be an additional qualification
	Experience working in multi-level marketing is an added advantage.
	Proven work experience in the power/energy industry
	Proven track record in sales/ distributor account management
	Customer management experience.


Key Functional Competencies:


	Business Performance Measurement & Management
	Computer & Information Technology Appreciation
	Marketing and Sales Acumen
	Planning and Budgeting
	Product & Service Advice & Support
	Sales Planning and Opportunity Management.
	Sales Tracking and Reporting
	Excellent communication and Managerial skills.
	The ability to work under stress and resolve conflict.
	Sales Forecasting
	Have solid knowledge of the sales terrain.
